queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of requested credit amounts on credit default probability and their role as determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the contribution of negative checking account balances to elevated default likelihood as a critical credit risk driver.
Assessing the correlation between extended loan repayment durations and increased default probability as a key determinant of credit risk.
